channel.title: Tools on Not a Peeker of Nature
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Not a Peeker of Nature

item.title: Tools in bioinformatics
item.description: Aspera Why use aspera: a. Reliability and integrity (ensures complete data integrity with checks at every packet transfer point and automatic retry mechanisms that handle intermittent network issues without any data loss or corruption.); b. High-speed transfers Installation on linux: An example of using aspera to download fastq data To be continued……
